name: California Grapes International, Inc.
summary: California Grapes International, Inc. imports, exports, and distributes American wines internationally. The company purchases goods directly from manufacturers in the United States and distributes these products to distributors, grocery stores, supermarkets and hypermarkets, consumers, and restaurants. It also provides services for exporting, marketing, promoting, distributing, and selling for the California wine industry. In addition, the company, through its subsidiaries, engages in the importation and distribution of products in China. California Grapes International, Inc. is based in Henderson, Nevada.
